substep.title: Invoke code-verify (I-per-slice gate)

check.action: Reset {{decomposition_strikes[current_slice.id]}} = 0 (slice completed successfully). Proceed to step 6.

Re-dispatch worker for this same slice with the verifier's findings as additional context (the worker addresses the findings, re-commits). Increment a separate per-slice re-implementation counter to prevent infinite loops: {{reimplementation_strikes[current_slice.id]}}.
If reimplementation_strikes >= 3, abort per Lock 17.3: "Slice {{slice_id}} has failed verification three times. Approach is wrong. Recommend abort + planning restart."

Loop-back to P or S. Halt this skill. Emit handoff: "code-verify identified a {{P|S}}-phase problem. Loop back to code-{plan|structure}, fix, then re-invoke code-implement from this slice."
Plan/structure unlock requires user re-engagement.

Per Lock 26 (fifth abort condition): D-phase loop-back in execution session is an ABORT. D requires brain-surgery; execution session is autonomous; these conflict.
Halt. Surface to user: "code-verify identified a D-phase problem. Per Lock 26, execution-session D-loopback aborts the workflow. Bundle preserved as evidence. Restart planning session with the new V-finding integrated."
